scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/kilter-migrate-windows && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/kilter-migrate-linux && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/kilter-migrate-macos-arm && bun build src/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/kilter-migrate-macos-x64
